expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to manage workspace membership.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership and audit event storage",
      "description": "As a system, I want membership state and audit event persistence so admin actions are tracked.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership role and audit event persistence available for workspace membership operations.",
        "Audit event persistence stores actor, action type, target member, and timestamp.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_workspace_membership_audit.sql",
        "src/domain/workspaceMembership.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add member invite flow by email",
      "description": "As an admin, I want invite members by email so I can grant workspace access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite action accepts email and role and creates pending membership invite.",
        "Invite action records corresponding audit event.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/inviteWorkspaceMember.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/workspaceMemberRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add member role change action",
      "description": "As an admin, I want change member role between viewer, editor, and admin so permissions stay correct.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role change action validates target role and updates stored membership role.",
        "Role change action records audit event with previous and new roles.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/changeWorkspaceMemberRole.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/workspaceMemberRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add workspace access revoke action",
      "description": "As an admin, I want revoke workspace access so removed members can no longer access workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke action removes or deactivates membership for target user.",
        "Revoke action records audit event for revocation action.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/revokeWorkspaceMember.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/workspaceMemberRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Show recent membership changes in settings page",
      "description": "As an admin, I want review recent membership changes in workspace settings page so I can audit access history.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page shows recent membership audit entries with action, actor, target, and timestamp.",
        "Audit list includes invite, role change, and revoke events.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/settings/WorkspaceMembershipAuditPanel.tsx",
        "src/server/queries/listWorkspaceMembershipAudit.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002",
        "US-003",
        "US-004"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
